rulings.Case Title: CHARLES LI VS. THAI MING CHIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Third Party Shuzhen Tu'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Authorizing Distribution Of Receivership Funds (Motions)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 11, 2023 line 1. THIRD PARTY SHUZHEN TU Third Party Shuzhen Tu'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Authorizing Distribution Of Receivership Funds (Motions) is CONTINUED to May 18, 2023 on the Court's own motion. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: ANA MACDONALD VS. DUKE PARTNERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 11, 2023 line 2. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC, WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss is DENIED. A binding, enforceable settlement agreement will toll the five-year statute. (See, Brown & Bryant, Inc. v. Hartford Accident & Indemnity Co.(1994) 24 Cal.App.4th 247, 254-56.) Implicit in Nationstar's request to dismiss is the request to have the Court find that Plaintiffs breached the settlement agreement in order to find that tolling ended. This the Court will not do on a Motion to Dismiss. If Defendant believes there is no longer an enforceable settlement, they can move to set it aside and reset the trial date. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: IRIS ADAMS ET AL VS. 1880 PINE LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 11, 2023 line 5. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED, with leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to plead facts required for punitive damages. (Code Civ. Proc., 3294(b).) Late opposition was considered but stricken. Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: STANYAN HOLDINGS LLC VS. STANYAN ST AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate 2021 Judgment And 2022 Order, Enter Judgment Of Dismissal And Restore The Status Quo Ante, Including Restoring Possession Of The 624 Stanyan Property To Movants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 11, 2023 line 7. DEFENDANT STANYAN ST AUTOMOTIVE CLINIC, LAURENCE NASEY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate 2021 Judgment And 2022 Order, Enter Judgment Of Dismissal And Restore The Status Quo Ante, Including Restoring Possession Of The 624 Stanyan Property To Movants is DENIED. Defendant failed to show that the scrivener's error is incurable. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice of: (1) the California Secretary of State Advanced Business Search; (2) the Certificate of Good Standing; (3) the San Francisco County Recorder Search of Public Records, in the April 17, 2023 Draper declaration is granted. Plaintiff's Request for Judicial Notice of the Application to Register a Foreign LLC, Statement of Information, and the entity details for Stanyan Holdings LLC is denied for lack of foundation. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
